name: Shipwright Guild Hall
unlockCondition: Maritime Guild Master status or 24,000,000 ducats with Guild connections
calculationsAnalysis: The Shipwright Guild Hall represents specialized institutional infrastructure for Venice's crucial shipbuilding industry. The construction cost of 13,000,000 ducats reflects the robust architecture and specialized technical facilities required, while the income of 90,000 ducats (0.69% return) represents membership fees, design certification charges, and quality inspection fees. The maintenance cost of 70,000 ducats (77.8% of income) creates a modest surplus appropriate for a non-profit institution. The employment capacity of 25 represents the administrative staff, naval engineers, and quality inspectors. The construction time of 20 days (1728000000ms) reflects the specialized construction requirements. This building creates a strategic investment in maritime industry governance with appropriate guild requirements reflecting the historical importance of standardization and quality control in Venice's shipbuilding industry, which was essential to both commercial and military power.
shortDescription: Headquarters of the Shipwright Guild governing naval construction and maritime engineering standards.
fullDescription: Overseeing Venice's crucial shipbuilding industry, the Shipwright Guild Hall regulates the construction techniques and standards that maintained the Republic's naval superiority. Featuring design archives, model testing facilities, timber quality control, technical libraries, and training spaces, this specialized institution ensured consistent excellence in both merchant and naval vessels. Its regulations governed everything from material selection to construction techniques across Venice's numerous shipyards.
flavorText: The ship is the most complex machine of our age, and the most vital to our prosperity—thus each nail, plank, and rope must meet standards forged from centuries of experience, triumph, and occasional tragedy at sea.

locationRequirements.environmentalEffects: Creates maritime engineering center, shipbuilding focus

constructionPhase3DPrompt: Renaissance Venetian Shipwright Guild Hall under construction, maritime engineering institution, ship design archive with large plan tables, model testing pool for hull evaluations, timber assessment laboratory, rope and sail quality testing areas, technical library for shipbuilding knowledge, training areas with partial ship sections, guild meeting chamber with ship models, ceremonial space for master certifications, facade with maritime symbols and famous ship designs, naval engineering equipment displays, isometric game perspective, stylized but detailed, focus on creating governance center for Venice's crucial shipbuilding industry
completedBuilding3DPrompt: Completed Renaissance Venetian Shipwright Guild Hall, impressive maritime institution featuring grand entrance with ship design motifs, central hall displaying ship models from galleys to merchant vessels, technical design room with large tables for ship plans, model testing facility where hull designs are evaluated in water, timber quality assessment laboratory, rope strength testing equipment, nautical engineering library with technical manuscripts, training area with sectional ship constructions, historically accurate but slightly stylized for game aesthetic, isometric game perspective, sense of naval engineering excellence and maritime tradition, guild officials reviewing designs, master shipwrights demonstrating techniques to apprentices, quality inspectors examining materials, atmosphere of technical precision and practical knowledge, perfect expression of Venice's shipbuilding superiority that enabled its maritime power

upgradePath: Advanced Naval Engineering Authority (cutting-edge ship design)

soundDesign.activitySounds: Design reviews, quality testing, apprentice instruction
